message:
feat(grpc): implement gRPC protocol with streaming patterns

Implement gRPC support including:
- Message framing codec (GrpcCodec with 1-byte flag + 4-byte length)
- All four streaming patterns: unary, server, client, bidirectional
- Status codes (all 17 gRPC status codes) and error handling
- Service traits (NamedService, ServiceHandler, method descriptors)
- Server infrastructure (ServerBuilder, interceptors, call context)
- Client infrastructure (Channel, GrpcClient, ResponseStream)
- Request/Response types with metadata support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
